direction: reuse freshly computed KLAS6 FLR0 locally
rationale: CalculataKlas6 stores FLR(0) and then immediately reads the same macro-backed sides.FLUX0[idx] value to form dependent FLR(1) and FLR(2) terms in several weir branches. Keeping each freshly computed flux0 in a local register removes those redundant read-backs while preserving the same flux expressions and operand order.
